Regardless of how close other cabs are a driver hours away from your location can accept your request.  Cancelling an accepted request likely will be marked on your profile & rating.  Re-requesting a cancelled booking will likely have the same driver accepting your request (still hours away).  There is no way of controlling this and its an endless retarded cycle of requesting and cancelling.  3.  You cannot set the default language.  It defaults to your current country.  Good luck in deciphering the hieroglyphs if you are in Thailand for example.  4.  In general the usability of the app is design so poorly in in-excusable. I wish they just copied Uber's ideas.  5. I received an sms one fine day to inform me they will not be lifting the ban as I had breached their passenger use policy and they need to ensure their drivers  receive genuine bookings to protect their livelihoods.
